form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th over 3575m at Bihorel Les Rouen beaten 38m by Kenzo Beach in 5-7yo handicap on March 15. Before that 9th over 2850m at Mauquenchy, well beaten by Love Shack in 5yo race on February 24 at $68. Needs an easier race.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Love Shack at Mauquenchy over 2850m in a 5yo race on February 24 at $65. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Luxor De Marzy at Enghien over 2875m in a 5yo race on March 10 at $24. Chief contender.

form.formComment: Back in form at the last couple of outings, two starts back posted a big 5.2m win at Maure-de-Bretagne beating Lady De Bouere in 5yo race on February 22. Last start just missed, good run when 2nd over 2875m at Enghien beaten 2.6m by Luxor De Marzy in 5yo race on March 10 at $9.80. This race appears well within his grasp.
